Pandowdy Apple IIe Emulator
Table of Contents

Namespace Pandowdy.UI

Classes

Apple2Display

Custom Avalonia control for rendering Apple IIe video output with NTSC color emulation.

AvaloniaRefreshTicker

Avalonia-based implementation of IRefreshTicker providing 60 Hz UI refresh timing.

MainWindow

Main application window for the Pandowdy Apple IIe emulator.

MainWindowFactory

Factory for creating fully-initialized MainWindow instances with proper dependency injection.

SoftSwitchStatusPanel

User control that displays Apple IIe soft switch status information in real-time.

Made with docfx
